styling_advice: The khaki casual jacket adds structure to your upper body, helping balance the volume of the light blue wide-leg denim pants without losing the relaxed street-style feel. Its warmer neutral tone complements your fair neutral-warm palette, while the jacket’s cleaner shape subtly restores waist definition compared with an oversized top. Paired with the light denim, the look stays soft, casual, and polished.
image_generation_prompt: High-definition fashion editorial image, full-body shot captured from a medium-long distance, head to toe fully visible with no cropping. A feminine casual model with fair-to-light neutral-warm skin tone and short tousled bob hair with soft bangs, styled in a closed casual khaki synthetic jacket with a relaxed structured shape, paired with light blue casual denim pants in a loose wide-leg silhouette. Soft pastel street-style mood, clean natural posing, balanced proportions. Background is a solid pure white backdrop only, absolutely no props, no gradients, no furniture, no studio equipment.
